_meta.source: FoodShield daily summary (composite of nowcast + IPC + FFPI + Open-Meteo + INFORM)
_meta.notes: Deterministic text built from actual signal deltas. No LLM. Regenerates every workflow tick (6h). Surfaced at the top of the Disturbances tab.

data.headline: 20 countries with active nowcast pressure; Yemen leads.
data.subhead: Today: 20 country nowcast moves · 18 IPC Phase 3+ crises · 16 environmental flags.

bullets.text: 20 countries on +8 or worse nowcast adjustment vs structural baseline today. Top mover: Yemen at +13.9.
18 countries with ≥25% population in IPC Phase 3+ food crisis. Worst: State of Palestine at 91%.
FAO Food Price Index up 1.6% month-on-month.
Active environmental signals: 11 drought-flagged, 5 flood-flagged countries today.
